headline: Final Sponsorship Opportunities for Sustainability LIVE @ London Climate Action Week
summary: London, 29 May 2026 – BizClik Media and Sustainability Magazine calls on sustainability leaders to secure the final sponsorship opportunities for Sustainability LIVE: The Leadership Summit at London Climate Action Week, taking place on 25 June 2026 at CodeNode, London. With the sponsorship deadline set for 5 June, organisations have just one week remaining to align their brand with one of the year's most significant climate action gatherings.
